zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Preston於1463年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓時，他的父親Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston39歲，母親Joan Molyneux33歲。他於1497年與Anne Burnell在愛爾蘭度布林結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1532年9月21日在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯斯塔姆倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Preston于1463年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓时，他的父亲Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston39岁，母亲Joan Molyneux33岁。他于1497年与Anne Burnell在爱尔兰度布林结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1532年9月21日在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯斯塔姆倫。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Preston was born in 1463, in Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston, was 39 and his mother, Joan Molyneux, was 33. He married Anne Burnell in 1497, in Dublin, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 September 1532, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Stamullen, County Meath, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Preston est né en 1463, à Gormanston, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan Molyneux, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Anne Burnell en 1497, à Dublin, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 septembre 1532, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Stamullen, County Meath, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Preston 1463 in Gormanston, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston 39 und seine Mutter Joan Molyneux 33. Er hat 1497 in Dublin, Irland Anne Burnell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. September 1532 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Stamullen, County Meath, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Preston è nato il nel 1463 nel Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Joan Molyneux, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Anne Burnell nel 1497, nel Dublin, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 settembre 1532, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Stamullen, County Meath, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Prestonが1463年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストンで生まれた時，父Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanstonは39歳，母Joan Molyneuxは33歳であった。1497年にアイルランドダブリンでAnne Burnellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1532年9月21日に故郷で69歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ メアススタムレンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Preston(이)가 1463년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 고먼스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Molyneux(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1497년 아일랜드 드블린에서 Anne Burnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1532년 9월 21일 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 미스 스타멀렌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Preston nasceu em 1463, em Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan Molyneux, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Burnell em 1497, em Dublin, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de setembro de 1532, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Stamullen, County Meath, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Preston родился в 1463 г. в местности горманстон, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Molyneux, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Burnell в 1497 г. в местности дублинь, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 сентября 1532 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности стамуллен, коунти мит, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Preston nació en 1463, en Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joan Molyneux, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Anne Burnell en 1497, en Dublin, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de septiembre de 1532, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Stamullen, County Meath, Irlanda.
